name: lecturn-deck
description: Convert PowerPoint (.pptx) ⇄ the lecturn.deck/1 JSON slide schema, and author/validate that JSON, with the bundled spec and a stdlib-only Python two-way converter. Import a .pptx to an editable deck/slide/element tree (media extracted, fidelity F0–F3 reported, no silent loss), or build a structurally valid .pptx from a deck JSON. Includes a specialist agent for multi-step convert-validate-verify loops.
